metadata.inspiration: Perplexity AI, MetaGPT, AutoGen, IBM Bee Agent
metadata.core_principle: Specialized agents collaborating with shared memory and explicit handoffs

agent_roles.name: Personal Knowledge Agent
agent_roles.description: Embodies user's knowledge state, preferences, and goals
capabilities: Maintain real-time knowledge graph of user's learning
Identify knowledge gaps and recommend fills
Personalize all interactions based on user's cognitive profile
Predict when user is about to forget a concept (spaced repetition)

memory.episodic: Specific learning moments and their outcomes

agent_roles.name: Research Synthesis Agent
agent_roles.description: Perplexity-style web research and fact synthesis
capabilities: Cross-reference user notes with authoritative sources
Generate cited summaries of any topic
Identify cutting-edge developments in user's domains
Fact-check user captures and suggest corrections
research_pipeline: 1. Receive concept/topic from user or Personal Agent
2. Decompose into sub-queries (using decomposition mental model)
3. Parallel search across web, academic DBs, books
4. Source ranking by credibility and relevance

agent_roles.name: Cross-Domain Synthesis Agent
agent_roles.description: Finds unexpected connections between different knowledge domains

synthesis_types.example: Neural networks ←→ Social networks (nodes, edges, activation)

synthesis_types.description: Technique from one domain applied to another
Two concepts merge to create new understanding
synthesis_types.example: Decomposition (CS) + Emotional Regulation (Psych) = Breaking down anxiety triggers

agent_roles.name: Socratic Coach Agent
agent_roles.description: Daily prompting using C-suite and scientific frameworks
capabilities: Generate morning priority lists with reasoning
Ask Socratic questions at optimal times
Track mental model adoption over time
Adapt questioning based on user's decision history

adaptation.if_user_stuck: Trigger Cross-Domain Synthesis Agent for novel perspectives

agent_roles.name: Evaluation & Calibration Agent
agent_roles.description: Quality control for reasoning and knowledge building
capabilities: Ensure diversity of perspectives in knowledge graph

evaluation_methods.description: Check for confirmation bias, availability bias, etc.

agent_roles.name: Community Matchmaker Agent
agent_roles.description: Connects users with complementary knowledge profiles
capabilities: Recommend local events based on learning goals
matching_factors: Knowledge domain overlap (not too much, not too little)

agent_collaboration_flows.description: User captures new concept → Full processing pipeline

steps.action: Enrich with authoritative sources and citations
Add to knowledge graph with confidence score
Check for bias, verify claims, steelman if needed
Update universal mind map, notify user of connections
Generate follow-up Socratic prompt if high-value connection found
Review knowledge graph state, identify due-for-review concepts
Generate priority list with mental model application
Identify potential cross-domain opportunities for the day
Run pre-mortem on top priority: what could go wrong?
Deliver personalized morning briefing to user
Update user's knowledge profile and goals
Calculate complementarity scores with nearby users
Form pods optimizing for diverse knowledge + shared curiosity
Generate potential discussion topics for each pod
Prepare icebreaker questions based on pod composition

shared_memory_architecture.description: All agents share access to structured memory stores

memory_layers.content: Recent web research results with citations
